title: Metallic Gold Tissue Sheets (50cm x 66cm) 5 Count - Premium Quality, Large Gift-Wrapping Paper for Crafts, Decorations, and Special Occasions
features: • Pack of 5 Sheets of Metallic Gold Tissue Paper
• Metallic Gold Tissue Paper Sheets each measure approximately 65cm x 50cm (26" x 20")
• Ideal for adding a lovely finishing touch to gift bags for birthday presents, 50th wedding anniversary gifts, Christmas gifts and more
• Use as part of a craft project, or to create tissue paper decorations
• Coordinate with other gold party supplies and party decorations from Unique Party
